mapper.select: select to_char(t.DEAL_TIME, 'yyyy-mm-dd') deal_time from dyn_receive_file t where t.id=#{id}

SELECT t.DBID_, t.DBVERSION_, t.EXECUTION_, t.OUTCOME_, t.ASSIGNEE_, t.PRIORITY_, t.STATE_, t.CREATE_, to_char(t.CREATE_,'yyyy-MM-dd hh24:mi:ss') as SEND_TIME, t.END_, t.DURATION_, t.NEXTIDX_, t.SUPERTASK_, t.TASK_ORDER_, t.OPEN_, t.TAKE_STATE_, t.PROCINST_, t.SUSPHISTSTATE_, t.TASK_TYPE_, t.TASK_B_ID_, t.TASK_TITLE_, t.TASK_SENDUSER_, t.TASK_SENDDEPT_, t.FORM_, t.PROCESS_DEF_NAME_, t.TASK_FINISHED_, t.TASK_STATE_, t.TASK_NAME_, t.HISACTINST_, t.WORKHAND_TYPE_, t.WORKHAND_USER_, u.NAME WORKHAND_USER_NAME, t.APP_ID_, t.IS_READTODO_, t.MOBILE_APPROVAL_, t.FORM_URL_MOBILE_, t.FORM_CODE_, t.ASSIGNEE_DEPT_, t.REASONABLE_FINISH_TIME_, t.WARNING_FINISH_TIME_, t.DESCR_ FROM BPM_HIST_TASK_V t
left join sys_user u on t.WORKHAND_USER_=u.id where t.TASK_STATE_ = '1' and t.ASSIGNEE_ = #{userId} and t.TASK_FINISHED_ = '0'
and t.CREATE_ > to_date(#{startTime},'yyyy-MM-dd hh24:mi:ss')
and t.CREATE_ < to_date(#{endTime},'yyyy-MM-dd hh24:mi:ss')
and t.TASK_TITLE_ like concat(concat('%',#{title}),'%')
order by t.PRIORITY_ desc, t.CREATE_ desc
